title: A2H Channel Capability Descriptor
description: Declares what a delivery channel supports for rendering A2H requests.

response_types.description: Which response types this channel can render

max_options.description: Maximum number of choice options the channel can display

supports_context_card.description: Whether the channel can render structured context data

supports_deadline_display.description: Whether the channel can show a deadline countdown

supports_agent_identity_badge.description: Whether the channel can render agent identity verification

response_latency.description: Typical time between delivery and human seeing the request

verification_method.description: How the channel verifies human identity on response

trust_level.description: How much trust can be placed in responses from this channel
